scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec backend php bin/console doctrine:migrations:migrate -n
scripts.db:import-services: docker compose exec backend php bin/console app:import-services
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:import
scripts.db:link-users: docker compose exec backend php bin/console app:link-service-records-to-users
scripts.users:list: docker compose exec backend php bin/console app:users:list
